Log:
  - Update to 2.3.0 [1]
  - Some port cleanup [2]

    - Remove duplicate and unused depends
    - Add missing depends
    - Use WX_CONFIG properly
    - Support FHS
    - Switch to PORTDATA
    - Install .desktop files into proper location
    - Fix compatibility with 11.x
